narrative:
Symmes Twp. township has 293 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.8 percentage points.
